state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Welcome to the Inventory Management System!

I can help you:
- Check current inventory levels
- Update stock counts
- Identify products needing restocking
- Process inventory adjustments

Please provide:
- Store ID
- Product SKU to check or update
